titleStmt.title: SII 9.39: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 39. (A.R. No. 325 of 1912.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE ARKESVARA TEMPLE AT KARSHANAPALLE, PUNGANUR ZAMINDARI, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This undated record gives the genealogy of the Noḻamba-Pallava kings as follows:—Iṟiva-Noḻamba's son was Nanni-Noḻamba; the latter's son was Poḻalchōra and his son was Vīra-Mahēndra (II). The last mentioned king is said to have journeyed to Noḻambavāḍi from Chōḻnāḍu and while staying at Kōḷāla (Kolar) installed Kīrtti-Gāmuṇḍa's son and bestowed upon Noḻamba-Gāvuṇḍa (the installed person ?) Beḷagaṭūru of Pulināṭṭakeṟe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samadhigatapañcamahāśa
bda pallavānvaya śrīpṛthuvīvalla
bha pallavakuḷatiḷakaikavākya sa
tyadilippa pallavarāma śrīmadiṟi
vanoḻaṁbanātana maga nanninoḻaṁba
nātana maga poḻaḻcōradēvanātana ma
ganavōghavākya pallavābharaṇa śrī
mat vīramahēndra noḻaṁbādhirā
jadēva cōḻnāḍindiḻtandu noḻaṁ
bavāḍiyaṁ pokku gaṁgaṟusā
sirama kōḷāladoḷiḻdu kirttigāmu
ṇḍana magaṁge paṭṭavaṁ kaṭṭi pulinā
ṭṭakeṟeya beḷagaṭūraṁ nūḻaṁba
gāvuṇḍage koḍageyagaydaṁ Ida
naḷida kavileyuma bāṇarāsi
yumanaḻidaṁ maṁgaḷa . svadattāṁ paraIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 9.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
